items.name: Intraday-Trading-Stratergy
items.description: A rule‑based intraday trading system for NSE stocks under ₹2,000. It combines 6 core indicators (ADX, Supertrend, MACD, VWAP, RSI, EMA stack) with learned “Never Trade” rules and dynamic ATR‑based risk management. Backtested over 30 days of 5‑minute data, achieving 66.3% win rate and a 2.43 profit factor.
